notApplicableAssertions: All Phase 1 assertions are data-validation assertions (VAL-TYPES-*, VAL-INSTR-*, VAL-TAXON-*, VAL-BANK-*, VAL-COURSE-*, VAL-DATA-*, VAL-XREF-*). Phase 1 is a data-processing phase with no user-facing UI surface.

notes.phase1Nature: Phase 1 is exclusively a data-processing phase that generates JSON data files (instruction-index.json, concept-taxonomy.json, question-bank.json, course-map.json). There is no user-facing UI to test via browser automation.
notes.validationMethod: Phase 1 validation was performed via scrutiny-validator which ran content validation script (npm run validate:content). Results: 611 assertions passed, 0 failed.
notes.userTestingNote: No browser automation was performed because Phase 1 assertions are all data-validation assertions that validate JSON structure and content, not UI behavior. The app shell exists but all pages are placeholder stubs ('Coming Soon') without data integration.
